vocabulary.example: 他从来不对朋友说谎，是一个非常诚实的人。
vocabulary.translation: He never lies to his friends; he is a very honest person.

vocabulary.example: 我也会给你更多的信心和鼓励。
vocabulary.translation: I will also give you more confidence and encouragement.

vocabulary.english: To contact; to keep in touch; connection
vocabulary.example: 我们分开后仍然保持联系，友谊从未中断。
vocabulary.translation: After we parted, we still kept in touch, and our friendship was never interrupted.

vocabulary.example: 真正的朋友会互相支持，共同进步。
vocabulary.translation: True friends support each other and make progress together.

vocabulary.example: 真正的朋友会互相支持，共同进步。
vocabulary.translation: True friends support each other and make progress together.

vocabulary.example: 真正的朋友会互相支持，共同进步。
vocabulary.translation: True friends support each other and make progress together.

vocabulary.example: 无论遇到什么困难，她都会鼓励我继续努力。
vocabulary.translation: No matter what difficulties I face, she always encourages me to keep working hard.

vocabulary.example: 我们虽然有误会，却没有影响友谊。
vocabulary.translation: Although we had a misunderstanding, it didn't influence our friendship.

vocabulary.example: 你还是那么友好，一点都没变。
vocabulary.translation: You are still just as friendly. You haven't changed at all.

vocabulary.example: 我们虽然有误会，却没有影响友谊。
vocabulary.translation: Although we had a misunderstanding, it didn't influence our friendship.

vocabulary.example: 他道歉之后，两个人的感情更深了。
vocabulary.translation: After he apologized, their bond became even deeper.

vocabulary.example: 我知道上次的事情让你误会了，我真的很抱歉。
vocabulary.translation: I know what happened last time caused a misunderstanding. I am truly sorry.

key_sentences.chinese: 真正的朋友会互相支持，共同进步。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhēn zhèng de péng yǒu huì hù xiāng zhī chí, gòng tóng jìn bù.
key_sentences.english: True friends support each other and make progress together.

key_sentences.chinese: 他从来不对朋友说谎，是一个非常诚实的人。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā cóng lái bú duì péng yǒu shuō huǎng, shì yí gè fēi cháng chéng shí de rén.
key_sentences.english: He never lies to his friends; he is a very honest person.

key_sentences.chinese: 我们虽然有误会，却没有影响友谊。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men suī rán yǒu wù huì, què méi yǒu yǐng xiǎng yǒu yì.
key_sentences.english: Although we had a misunderstanding, it did not influence our friendship.

key_sentences.chinese: 他道歉之后，两个人的感情更深了。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā dào qiàn zhī hòu, liǎng gè rén de gǎn qíng gèng shēn le.
key_sentences.english: After he apologized, their bond became even deeper.

key_sentences.chinese: 无论遇到什么困难，她都会鼓励我继续努力。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wú lùn yù dào shén me kùn nán, tā dōu huì gǔ lì wǒ jì xù nǔ lì.
key_sentences.english: No matter what difficulties I face, she always encourages me to keep working hard.

key_sentences.chinese: 我们分开后仍然保持联系，友谊从未中断。
key_sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men fēn kāi hòu réng rán bǎo chí lián xì, yǒu yì cóng wèi zhōng duàn.
key_sentences.english: After we parted, we still kept in touch, and our friendship was never interrupted.

key_sentences.chinese: 真正的友谊需要互相支持和诚实。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhēn zhèng de yǒu yì xū yào hù xiāng zhī chí hé chéng shí.
key_sentences.english: True friendship requires mutual support and honesty.

key_sentences.chinese: 他们共同经历了很多，友谊越来越深厚。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā men gòng tóng jīng lì le hěn duō, yǒu yì yuè lái yuè shēn hòu.
key_sentences.english: They experienced a lot together, and their friendship grew deeper and deeper.

key_sentences.chinese: 她鼓励他要诚实，这让他们的关系更加信任。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā gǔ lì tā yào chéng shí, zhè ràng tā men de guān xì gèng jiā xìn rèn.
key_sentences.english: She encouraged him to be honest, which made their relationship more trusting.

grammar_points.title: 却 — But / However (indicating contrast)
grammar_points.explanation: 却 is placed directly before a verb or adjective to show contrast or an unexpected result. It appears inside the second clause, not at the start of the sentence. It often signals something surprising or contrary to expectations. The subject of the second clause may be stated or omitted if it is the same as the first. Structure: [Clause 1], Subject + 却 + Verb/Adj.

examples.chinese: 他们有误会，却互相谅解了。
examples.pinyin: Tā men yǒu wù huì, què hù xiāng liàng jiě le.
examples.english: They had a misunderstanding, but forgave each other anyway.

examples.chinese: 她很忙，却从不忘记联系老朋友。
examples.pinyin: Tā hěn máng, què cóng bú wàng jì lián xì lǎo péng yǒu.
examples.english: She is very busy, but never forgets to contact old friends.

exercises.question: 他们发生了误会，_____ 还是好朋友。
Choose the sentence where 却 is used correctly.
exercises.correct: 他道歉了，友谊却更淡了。
options: 他道歉了，友谊却更淡了。
却他道歉了，友谊更淡了。
他道歉了，友谊更淡了却。
他道歉却了，友谊更淡了。
option_pinyin: Tā dào qiàn le, yǒu yì què gèng dàn le.
Què tā dào qiàn le, yǒu yì gèng dàn le.
Tā dào qiàn le, yǒu yì gèng dàn le què.
Tā dào qiàn què le, yǒu yì gèng dàn le.

exercises.question: 她没有信心，_____ 坚持下去了。
What does 却 indicate in a sentence?
他道歉了，她 _____ 没有原谅他。

grammar_points.title: 从来 — Never / Always (emphasizing habitual negation or affirmation)
grammar_points.explanation: 从来 is an adverb meaning 'always' or 'never' in the context of habitual behavior. It is almost always used with negation: 从来不 (never) or 从来没有 (have never). Occasionally it can appear with affirmative verbs in set phrases. Structure: Subject + 从来 + 不/没有 + Verb. Example: 他从来不撒谎。(He never lies.) Note: 从来 emphasizes that something has never happened at any time in the past.

examples.chinese: 他从来不背叛朋友，是一个诚实的人。
examples.pinyin: Tā cóng lái bú bèi pàn péng yǒu, shì yí gè chéng shí de rén.
examples.english: He never betrays his friends; he is an honest person.

examples.chinese: 她从来没有忘记过我们共同的友谊。
examples.pinyin: Tā cóng lái méi yǒu wàng jì guò wǒ men gòng tóng de yǒu yì.
examples.english: She has never forgotten our shared friendship.

exercises.question: Which sentence correctly uses 从来不?
option_pinyin: Tā cóng lái bù wù huì péng yǒu.
Tā bù cóng lái wù huì péng yǒu.
Tā wù huì cóng lái bù péng yǒu.
Tā bù wù huì cóng lái péng yǒu.

exercises.question: 他们从来没有 _____ 联系。
从来 is most commonly followed by:
真正的朋友从来 _____ 在困难时离开你。

grammar_points.title: 互相 — Each other / Mutually
grammar_points.explanation: 互相 is an adverb meaning 'mutually' or 'each other'. It is placed before a verb to show that two or more people are doing something to or for one another. It cannot be used when only one person is doing an action. Structure: Subject (plural) + 互相 + Verb. Example: 他们互相帮助。(They help each other.) Note: 互相 always refers to two or more subjects performing the same action toward one another.

examples.chinese: 好朋友应该互相鼓励，共同成长。
examples.pinyin: Hǎo péng yǒu yīng gāi hù xiāng gǔ lì, gòng tóng chéng zhǎng.
examples.english: Good friends should encourage each other and grow together.

examples.chinese: 他们互相支持，友谊越来越深。
examples.pinyin: Tā men hù xiāng zhī chí, yǒu yì yuè lái yuè shēn.
examples.english: They support each other, and their friendship grows deeper and deeper.

exercises.question: 朋友之间应该 _____ 鼓励。
Which sentence correctly uses 互相?
exercises.correct: 他们互相鼓励，共同进步。
options: 他们互相鼓励，共同进步。
互相他们鼓励，共同进步。
他们鼓励互相，共同进步。
option_pinyin: Tā men hù xiāng gǔ lì, gòng tóng jìn bù.
Tā hù xiāng gǔ lì tā.
Hù xiāng tā men gǔ lì, gòng tóng jìn bù.
Tā men gǔ lì hù xiāng, gòng tóng jìn bù.

exercises.question: 他们 _____ 联系，从来没有中断过友谊。
互相 can only be used when:
exercises.correct: Two or more people do the same action toward each other
options: Two or more people do the same action toward each other
One person does an action by themselves
Someone does an action in the future

exercises.question: 朋友要 _____ 支持，这样友谊才能长久。

culture_notes.title: Friendship Proverb — 在外靠朋友
culture_notes.content: A well-known Chinese saying goes: 在家靠父母，出门靠朋友 (At home you rely on your parents; outside you rely on your friends). This proverb reflects the central role that social connections play in Chinese culture. While Western culture often emphasizes individual independence, Chinese culture places great value on building and maintaining a network of trusted relationships (关系, guānxi). Friends are expected to help each other in practical ways — not just emotionally. The act of asking for help is seen as an expression of trust, and refusing to help can damage a relationship. Maintaining friendships over time through regular contact and mutual support is considered a virtue.

quiz.question: What does 联系 mean?
quiz.correct: To contact; to keep in touch
options: To contact; to keep in touch

quiz.question: What is the difference between 道歉 and 抱歉?
quiz.correct: 道歉 is the act of apologizing; 抱歉 is the feeling of being sorry
options: 道歉 is the act of apologizing; 抱歉 is the feeling of being sorry
They mean exactly the same thing
道歉 means friendship; 抱歉 means honesty
道歉 is a noun; 抱歉 is a verb only

quiz.question: Choose the correct sentence with 从来不.
Fill in the blank: 好朋友应该 _____ 鼓励。
What does the phrase 保持联系 mean?
Which idiom means 'Adversity reveals true friendship'?
Fill in: 他们发生了误会，_____ 还是好朋友。
What does the phrase 道歉和好 mean?
Which cultural value does the proverb 在家靠父母，出门靠朋友 highlight?
quiz.correct: The importance of social connections outside the home
options: The importance of social connections outside the home

quiz.question: Translate: True friendship requires mutual support — which is correct?
quiz.correct: 真正的友谊需要互相支持和诚实。
options: 真正的友谊需要互相支持和诚实。
互相支持需要友谊和诚实。
友谊互相支持需要真正诚实。
诚实友谊需要支持互相。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 爱玲，我知道上次的事情让你误会了，我真的很抱歉。
lines.pinyin: Ài Líng, wǒ zhī dào shàng cì de shì qíng ràng nǐ wù huì le, wǒ zhēn de hěn bào qiàn.
lines.english: Eileen, I know what happened last time caused a misunderstanding. I am truly sorry.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我也有点抱歉，我应该先听你解释，而不是生气。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yě yǒu diǎn bào qiàn, wǒ yīng gāi xiān tīng nǐ jiě shì, ér bú shì shēng qì.
lines.english: I also feel a bit sorry. I should have listened to your explanation first, instead of getting angry.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 真正的朋友应该互相支持，我从来不想伤害你。
lines.pinyin: Zhēn zhèng de péng yǒu yīng gāi hù xiāng zhī chí, wǒ cóng lái bù xiǎng shāng hài nǐ.
lines.english: True friends should support each other. I never want to hurt you.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我知道。你是一个非常诚实的人，我应该信任你。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zhī dào. Nǐ shì yí gè fēi cháng chéng shí de rén, wǒ yīng gāi xìn rèn nǐ.
lines.english: I know. You are a very honest person; I should trust you.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我们和好吧，友谊比什么都重要。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ men hé hǎo ba, yǒu yì bǐ shén me dōu zhòng yào.
lines.english: Let's make up. Friendship is more important than anything.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 好，不管发生什么，我们都要保持联系，也要共同进步
lines.pinyin: Hǎo,  bù guǎn fā shēng shén me，wǒ men dōu bǎo chí lián xì,yě yào gòng tóng jìn bù.
lines.english: Okay. no matter what happens, we will keep in touch and also make progress together.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我也会给你更多的信心和鼓励，朋友就是要互相帮助。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yě huì gěi nǐ gèng duō de xìn xīn hé gǔ lì, péng yǒu jiù shì yào hù xiāng bāng zhù.
lines.english: I will also give you more confidence and encouragement. That's what friends are for — to help each other.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 爱玲！好久不见，我们已经五年没联系了！
lines.pinyin: Ài Líng! Hǎo jiǔ bú jiàn, wǒ men yǐ jīng wǔ nián méi lián xì le!
lines.english: Eileen! Long time no see. We haven't been in touch for five years!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 是啊！但是我从来没有忘记我们的友谊。
lines.pinyin: Shì a! Dàn shì wǒ cóng lái méi yǒu wàng jì wǒ men de yǒu yì.
lines.english: That's right! But I have never forgotten our friendship.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 我也是。真正的友谊不会因为时间而消失。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ yě shì. Zhēn zhèng de yǒu yì bú huì yīn wèi shí jiān ér xiāo shī.
lines.english: Me too. True friendship doesn't disappear with time.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 你还是那么友好，一点都没变。我很高兴我们重新联系了。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ hái shì nà me yǒu hǎo, yì diǎn dōu méi biàn. Wǒ hěn gāo xìng wǒ men chóng xīn lián xì le.
lines.english: You are still just as friendly. You haven't changed at all. I'm glad we reconnected.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 以后我们要保持联系，我很怀念以前，每次都有说不完的话的时光。
lines.pinyin: Yǐ hòu wǒ men yào bǎo chí lián xì, wǒ hěn huái niàn yǐ qián ， měi cì dōu yǒu shuō bù wán de huà de shí guāng
lines.english: From now on we should keep contact,I miss the old days that we always had so many stories to tell!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 当然！有一段真正的友谊，是多么不容易！
lines.pinyin: Dāng rán! Yǒu yí duàn zhēn zhèng de yǒu yì ， shì duō me bù róng yì.
lines.english: Of course! It is very precious to have a genuine friendship.
